source_label: Private owner-provided Lark export; URL retained only in ignored local audit evidence.
private_provenance_policy: Private owner-provided export URLs and section-level provenance are retained only in ignored local audit evidence, not in public repository files.
case_heading_policy: Official-source-only cases use plain Case headings plus the public label `Source: Official.`; pseudo-author labels are not allowed.
reason: Owner-provided launch material includes prompt examples, product notes, and downloaded media for first local guide/prompt scaffold. Private source URLs are not exposed in public repository files.
